# ConvertUnlimited - Browser-Native File Tools

ConvertUnlimited provides browser-native utilities for image conversion, PDF workflows, document cleanup, developer text tools, and related file tasks.

Primary public site:
https://convertunlimited.com/

Privacy build:
https://privacy.convertunlimited.com/

## Core Capabilities
- Image conversion: WebP, PNG, JPG, HEIC, AVIF, resizing, compression, metadata removal, watermarking, and solid-background removal.
- PDF tools: merge, split, compress, images to PDF, and PDF to images.
- Developer utilities: JSON formatting, CSV conversion and cleanup, Base64, URL encoding, hashes, UUIDs, timestamps, JWT decoding, regex testing, and diff checking.
- Supported processing flows run locally in the browser after the static page loads.
- File contents are not intentionally uploaded by supported tools.

## Privacy Guidance
- The public site may load ads and analytics.
- Use the privacy build for privacy-sensitive workflows.
- The privacy build is generated without ads, analytics, remote fonts, or third-party runtime scripts.
- Do not describe the public site as a no-ads or no-analytics environment.

## Contact & Links
- Public site: https://convertunlimited.com/
- Privacy build: https://privacy.convertunlimited.com/
